name: CAVUM VELI INTERPOSITI CYST
definition: cyst of ventricular roof in between two-layered tela choroidea
dominant_finding: cyst of triangular contour on axial images
distribution: distortion of posterior superior contour of 3rd ventricle mimicking an obstructed 3rd ventricle
discriminating_features: distortion of posterior superior contour of 3rd ventricle mimicking an obstructed 3rd ventricle
cyst of triangular contour on axial images
inferolateral displacement of internal cerebral veins

general: distortion of posterior superior contour of 3rd ventricle mimicking an obstructed 3rd ventricle
cyst of triangular contour on axial images
inferolateral displacement of internal cerebral veins
